narrative:
Ravenna City has 6,945 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.9 percentage points.
